title: Phytons Hearts
description: Survival Friendly Items that Add or Remove Hearts and Health permanently! Fully configurable!
body:
# Phytons Hearts

Ever wanted an item that could increase or decrease your hearts?
Great for custom survival experiences, hardcore challenges, or RPG-style progression.
Includes a few achievements.
Compatible with multiplayer!


## Additions
💖 **Health Upgrade** – Permanently increases your maximum hearts. If you exceed two full health bars (20 hearts), the extra hearts become temporary and will disappear one by one upon death.

🖤 **Health Ripper** – Permanently reduces your maximum hearts, allowing for unique challenge runs or strategic gameplay adjustments.
Consuming this will give you your heart back, which can be reconsumed to regain your health.

💀 **Dying** - will cause you to lose temporary hearts, but permanent hearts will not be removed.
The number of permanent hearts can be configured.


## Installation
**Datapack** Installation: Drop the datapack into your world's datapacks folder, add Resource pack and /reload

**Mod** Installation: drop Jar file in mods folder, once the world has loaded type /reload

**On Servers** For both Mod and datapack, make sure that every player has the required resource pack, this can be done using the server-resource pack in server.properties

<details>
  <summary>Settings</summary>
  
## Settings
  
| Setting                | Description                                                    |
|------------------------|:---------------------------------------------------------------|
|/function phytons_hearts:settings     | Shows settings|
|/function phytons_hearts:give_health_upgrade| Gives you a health upgrade |                          
|/function phytons_hearts:give_health_ripper | Gives you a health ripper |                               
|Toggle Chat Messages         | Enables or disables a chat message upon consuming an item |
|Toggle Particle effects      | Enables or disables the sound effects                     |
|Item Multiplier              | The ammount of health given/taken when consuming an item  |
|Full Loss                    | If set, player will loose all non permanent hearts on death instead of one at a time
|Health Cap                   | Maximum health obtainable with the heart item
|Permacap                     | The ammount of health that stays permanently even on death|
|Uninstal                     | Removes all scoreboards etc, allowing for clean removal   |

</details>

### Datapack drawbacks!
Due to limitations with datapacks, the items will not appear in the creative inventory list. As well as not having entries in mods such as JEI.

For mod users: This applies as well, since the mod version is just the repackaged datapack

These limitations should however in no way affect other gameplay :)
